title: Nti 65cm Eco Friendly Long Spider Catcher For Removing Spiders Easy & Safe To Use
features: Easily removes spiders, cockroaches, moths and crane flies
description: Product Description If you dislike spiders or other insects in your house and want to remove them without any harm then what you need is this practical spider catcher which works by surrounding the spider with the bristles that close around the spider, the bristles harmlessly trap the spider to allow you to pickup and release the spider outside. The spider catcher easily removes spiders, cockroaches, moths and crane flies without harming them. The 65cm long arm keeps you at a safe and comfortable distance and reaches up to ceilings and corners. The catcher is eco friendly and is a great gadget for nature loves and outdoor enthusiasts. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a physician. Flammable: Keep away from heat or open flame. Store in a cool, dry place. For sensitive skin, perform a patch test before full use.
